hyperedges.label: Swappable LLM provider system (env config, adapter, Anthropic + echo providers)
Folder-scoped agent chat feature (UI + phase + storage)
Three-tab editor pattern (markdown/CSV/slides) implemented across TODO phases and index.html panes

nodes.label: Agent v1 context building: whole-folder-in-context.  Every readable text file un
nodes.norm_label: agent v1 context building: whole-folder-in-context.  every readable text file un

nodes.label: Render the system prompt with every text file in `folder` inlined.
nodes.norm_label: render the system prompt with every text file in `folder` inlined.

nodes.label: LLM provider adapter. The rest of the app only talks to `LLMProvider`, so swappi
nodes.norm_label: llm provider adapter. the rest of the app only talks to `llmprovider`, so swappi

nodes.label: Minimal chat interface: system prompt + message history in, text out.
nodes.norm_label: minimal chat interface: system prompt + message history in, text out.

nodes.label: Raised when the provider can't produce a reply (auth, network, ...).
nodes.norm_label: raised when the provider can't produce a reply (auth, network, ...).

nodes.label: Offline stand-in: proves the adapter works without any API. Useful for     devel
nodes.norm_label: offline stand-in: proves the adapter works without any api. useful for     devel

nodes.label: Factory behind the adapter. LLM_PROVIDER env var picks the backend.
nodes.norm_label: factory behind the adapter. llm_provider env var picks the backend.

nodes.label: Chat API for the folder-scoped agent.    GET    /api/chat?folder=...  — history
nodes.norm_label: chat api for the folder-scoped agent.    get    /api/chat?folder=...  — history

nodes.label: Configuration. Workspace root comes from the WORKSPACE_ROOT env var, falling bac
nodes.norm_label: configuration. workspace root comes from the workspace_root env var, falling bac

nodes.label: SQLite index via SQLAlchemy. The DB never stores document content — only metadat
nodes.norm_label: sqlite index via sqlalchemy. the db never stores document content — only metadat

nodes.label: Agent chat history, per scoped folder. This is agent memory, not     document st
nodes.norm_label: agent chat history, per scoped folder. this is agent memory, not     document st

nodes.label: FastAPI app: serves the static frontend and the file-backbone API.  API:   GET
nodes.norm_label: fastapi app: serves the static frontend and the file-backbone api.  api:   get

nodes.label: Resolve a client-supplied relative path, rejecting anything that     escapes the
nodes.norm_label: resolve a client-supplied relative path, rejecting anything that     escapes the

nodes.label: Write contents to a file inside the workspace, then re-sync the index.
nodes.norm_label: write contents to a file inside the workspace, then re-sync the index.

nodes.label: Create a (possibly nested) folder inside the workspace.
nodes.norm_label: create a (possibly nested) folder inside the workspace.

nodes.label: Sync what's on disk into the SQLite `files` table.  The filesystem is the source
nodes.norm_label: sync what's on disk into the sqlite `files` table.  the filesystem is the source

nodes.label: True for the app's own code folder, ignored dirs, and dot-folders —     none of
nodes.norm_label: true for the app's own code folder, ignored dirs, and dot-folders —     none of

nodes.label: Upsert all files on disk into the index; prune rows for deleted files.
nodes.norm_label: upsert all files on disk into the index; prune rows for deleted files.

nodes.norm_label: unified notes / slides / data workspace (project overview)
